description: Lytical is an analytics platform for websites and marketing teams that tracks visitor behavior, SEO performance, and related marketing data. It also offers AI-assisted analysis and integrations with external marketing platforms.
summary: Lytical exposes a documented OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.lytical.ai` plus documented website tracking/ingest HTTP endpoints under `https://app.lytical.ai/i/v1`, whose public auth requirements are not clearly documented.
